objective: Add Automation Studio artifact/data-extension/user selector UX
validationPlan: cd frontend; npm run lint; npm run build:ci; .\node_modules\.bin\playwright.cmd test tests/e2e/automation-studio.spec.ts tests/e2e/automation-builder.spec.ts --project=chromium --reporter=line
rollbackNotes: Preserve unrelated user changes; revert only this checkpoint scope if explicitly approved.
outcome: Automation Studio authoring now uses governed data-extension/user selectors, scoped artifact get-by-id verification, and campaign catalog selection for journey send nodes while preserving existing backend activity input/output contracts.
residualRisks: Local frontend validation only; true artifact browse/search still needs an automation-service list/search endpoint.
Target runtime replay, object-store drills, cleanup/retention proof, and production/parity evidence remain separate blocked release concerns.
nextAction: Continue with alertmanager-placeholder-secret-coverage if it remains the highest-score safe local backlog item, or collect external evidence for blocked release/provider/high-volume work.
